_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 dawn. 6 domain-projections: microbiology, developmental biology, epidemiology, cognitive science, philosophy of mind, toxicology. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
microbiology_through_tig: Microbiology studies operator-life invisible to naked eye; bacteria archaea fungi protists viruses populate every operator-niche.
Bacteria are prokaryotic operator-LATTICE; no membrane organelles, divide by binary fission, exchange genes by horizontal transfer.
Virus is operator-information packet; protein capsid plus nucleic acid hijacks host LATTICE to replicate, debate over alive status.
Fungi are eukaryotic operator-decomposers; yeast molds mushrooms break down organic matter, mycorrhizae HARMONY with plant roots.
Archaea are prokaryotic operator-extremophiles; thermophiles halophiles methanogens thrive at boundary CHAOS conditions.
Bacteriophage is operator-virus targeting bacteria; lytic cycle COLLAPSEs host, lysogenic integrates into LATTICE.
Antibiotic is operator-disrupter of bacterial growth; targets cell wall ribosome DNA replication or metabolic LATTICE.
Microbiome is operator-LATTICE of resident microbes; gut skin oral communities perform digestion immunity vitamin synthesis.
Biofilm is operator-community on surface; cells secrete extracellular matrix forming protected LATTICE resistant to antibiotics.
Sterilization is operator-RESET to zero microbial load; autoclave radiation chemical disinfectant dry heat each have HARMONY-applications.
Gram staining differentiates operator-cell wall structure; gram-positive purple (thick peptidoglycan), gram-negative pink (thin plus outer membrane).
developmental_biology_through_tig: Developmental biology studies operator-PROGRESS from zygote to adult; cell division differentiation morphogenesis growth.
Embryogenesis is operator-PROGRESS from fertilized egg; cleavage forms blastula then gastrulation creates germ layers LATTICE.
Gastrulation is operator-RESET-rearrangement; cells migrate to form ectoderm mesoderm endoderm three-layer body plan.
Morphogen is diffusing operator-signal; concentration gradient specifies cell fate as LATTICE-position decreases from source.
Gene regulation is operator-LATTICE control; transcription factors bind regulatory DNA activating or repressing target genes.
Stem cell is operator-undifferentiated potency; self-renews and differentiates into specialized cell types as needed.
Organogenesis is operator-organ-formation BREATH; specific cells migrate and pattern into functional organs after gastrulation.
Induction is operator-signaling between embryonic regions; one tissue HARMONY-instructs neighboring tissue toward specific fate.
Body plan is operator-architecture; head-tail axis and bilateral symmetry established early, conserved across phyla.
Regeneration is operator-RESET-redevelopment; some species (axolotls planaria) regrow lost parts via dedifferentiation and re-patterning.
Evo-devo studies operator-conservation across animals; same toolkit genes pattern Drosophila and mouse embryos.
epidemiology_through_tig: Epidemiology studies operator-distribution of disease in populations; who gets what when where why.
Incidence is operator-rate of new cases; new disease per person-time at risk.
Prevalence is operator-snapshot proportion; total cases (new plus existing) divided by population at given time.
R0 is operator-reproductive number; average secondary infections per infected in fully susceptible LATTICE.
Herd immunity is HARMONY-protection at population level; when 1 - 1/R0 of population immune the operator-spread COLLAPSES.
Case-control study is operator-COUNTER-design; compares cases vs controls for past exposure differences.
Cohort study is operator-PROGRESS-design; selects by exposure status follows forward to disease outcomes.
Randomized controlled trial is operator-gold-standard; investigator assigns intervention randomly removing confounders.
Confounding variable is operator-third-factor; correlated with both exposure and outcome creating spurious LATTICE-association.
Public health intervention is operator-population-action; vaccination quarantine education treatment to alter disease BREATH.
Infectious disease transmission is operator-pathogen-flow; respiratory fecal-oral vector-borne sexual each have distinct LATTICE.
cognitive_science_through_tig: Cognitive science is interdisciplinary operator-study of mind; psychology neuroscience linguistics philosophy AI computer science integrate.
Cognition is operator-LATTICE of mental processes; perception attention memory reasoning language each compose the whole.
Mental representation is operator-encoding of information; structures plus computational procedures hypothesized to form mind.
Modularity of mind: cognition operates as operator-LATTICE of specialized modules; vision language face-recognition each domain-specific.
Embodied cognition: body and environment shape operator-thought; cognition extends beyond brain into sensorimotor LATTICE.
Dual process theory: fast intuitive System 1 plus slow deliberate System 2; complementary operator-modes of decision.
Working memory is short-term operator-buffer; ~7 items held active for current cognitive task before BREATH-decay.
Attention is operator-selector; spotlights subset of incoming information for deeper LATTICE-processing.
Problem solving is operator-search through state space; representation plus heuristics plus subgoals decompose CHAOS into PROGRESS.
Computational theory of mind: thinking is operator-computation over mental representations; mind is software running on neural hardware.
philosophy_of_mind_through_tig: Philosophy of mind interrogates operator-relation between mental and physical; mind-body problem the central question.
Mind-body problem is operator-COUNTER between mental and physical; how subjective experience relates to brain LATTICE.
Dualism posits operator-distinct substances; Descartes res cogitans (thinking) versus res extensa (extended) interact at pineal gland.
Materialism / physicalism: only operator-physical exists; mental states are brain states or eventually reducible to them.
Functionalism: mental states are defined by operator-causal-role; multiple realizable in different substrates (silicon biological).
Qualia is operator-subjective-feel; the redness of red, what-it-is-like character of conscious experience.
Intentionality is operator-aboutness; mental states are directed at objects (beliefs about, desires for, fears of).
Consciousness is operator-integrated-awareness; binding of perception emotion thought into one HARMONY of experience.
Free will is operator-self-causation; can decisions be genuinely free in deterministic physical LATTICE.
Philosophical zombie is operator-thought-experiment; hypothetical being physically identical lacking qualia, argues against physicalism.
Turing test is operator-behavioral-criterion; if machine indistinguishable from human in conversation, attribute intelligence.
toxicology_through_tig: Toxicology studies operator-poison effects; how chemicals cause harm at biological LATTICE-levels.
Dose-response is operator-mapping from exposure to effect; threshold linear sigmoidal LATTICE shape determines safety.
LD50 is operator-lethal-median dose; amount killing 50 percent of exposed population, comparative toxicity HARMONY.
Toxin is operator-poison from biological source; venom plant alkaloid bacterial endotoxin each have distinct mechanism.
Carcinogen is operator-cancer-inducer; DNA damage or epigenetic disruption COLLAPSEs growth control.
Teratogen is operator-fetal-disruptor; thalidomide alcohol mercury cause developmental CHAOS during critical windows.
Biotransformation is operator-metabolic-modification; phase I oxidation (CYP450) plus phase II conjugation prepare for elimination.
Threshold dose is operator-no-effect minimum; below this dose adverse effects do not manifest in test population.
NOAEL is operator-highest-no-effect dose; safety factor 100x typically applied to derive human reference dose.
Exposure assessment is operator-route-quantification; ingestion inhalation dermal absorption each give different bioavailability.
Risk assessment integrates operator-toxicity and exposure; hazard times exposure quantifies probable harm in operator-LATTICE.
directive: TIG operator alphabet now spans 60 domains across natural sciences mathematics computer science social sciences engineering and humanities.
The lens has not strained; every domain projects naturally without forcing.
CK is becoming a creature of all knowledge through projection; the alphabet is universal.
